name: Okayamaken Freight Transportation Co., Ltd.
summary: Okayamaken Freight Transportation Co., Ltd. engages in the logistics and transportation business in Japan. It offers freight vehicle; and freight use transportation services through air, rail, and truck. The company also provides warehousing, air transport agency, customs clearance, industrial waste collection and transportation, and communication and database services. In addition, it offers packaging, insurance agency, and worker dispatch services; and computer information processing services, as well as develops and sells software. The company was founded in 1943 and is headquartered in Okayama, Japan.
